notes: Blind run using /workspaces/wardleymap_math_model/skills/wardley-map/SKILL.md. Validator and layout-check invocation were blocked by sandbox permissions; the map was walked manually against the same three validator rules (coords in [0,1], endpoints declared, nu(a) >= nu(b) on every edge) and manually against the layout advisory checks (near-duplicates, stage-boundary, canvas-edge, stage balance).
